name: Cabbage Noodles
recipeIngredient: 8 oz fine noodles or angel hair pasta cut into 2 inch lengths
1/2 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package directions and drain.
2. In a separate pan, saute the cabbage in vegetable broth until tender (about 10 minutes).
3. Add the cooked noodles to the cabbage mixture and mix well.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the sour cream or yogurt.
